SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?bridge ?bridgeLabel WHERE {
  ?bridge wdt:P31 wd:Q127872 .
  ?bridge wdt:P510 ?status .
  VALUES ?status {
    wd:Q11602 wd:Q11604
  }
  ?bridge wdt:P1275 ?lengthQuantity .
  ?lengthQuantity wikibase:quantityAmount ?lengthValue .
  FILTER(?lengthValue > 600)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?bridge rdfs:label ?bridgeLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?bridgeLabel) = "en")
  }
}
```
